strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, aligning with required AI skill
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and craftsmanship
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Aisha Okonkwo) but all links and content under 'szabobogdan' — potential identity mismatch
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — key required stack elements not clearly demonstrated
German language proficiency is only basic, while role is based in Berlin and requires close collaboration with local teams
response.justification: Aisha demonstrates deep full-stack expertise, strong AI-agent experience, and a track record of building scalable, test-driven systems — all core to the role. However, the name inconsistency raises red flags, and critical stack components like Nest.js and Vitest are absent from the resume, despite being required. The basic German proficiency may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
